editor.title: Publisher
editor.body: The DashFlow site and service are published by Julien Nedellec, a private individual, reachable at contact@nedellec-julien.fr. [Postal address to be completed.]

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.body: The site is hosted by [host to be completed: name, address, phone]. The servers are located in France.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.body: All elements of the site (text, visuals, source code, the DashFlow name and identity) are protected by intellectual property law. Any reproduction or reuse without prior written permission is prohibited.

data.title: Personal data
data.body: DashFlow encrypts your data end to end, on your device. The publisher only keeps encrypted data it cannot read, along with the information strictly necessary for your account (email address, subscription status). Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, port, and erase your data. To exercise it, write to contact@nedellec-julien.fr.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: DashFlow uses no advertising cookies and no third-party trackers. The only items stored are a session cookie strictly necessary for sign-in and preferences saved locally on your device (theme, language).

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any question about the site or your data:

encryption.subtitle: Your data is encrypted locally before being sent to the server.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.

hero.titleLine2: No one else can read them.
hero.subtitle: DashFlow manages your budget and your family's health records in a single app. Everything is encrypted on your device before it leaves: neither the server nor we ever see your data in the clear.
hero.reassurance: Free account, no credit card. Encryption included.
hero.screenshotAlt: DashFlow budget overview: envelopes, monthly charges, income and money left to spend

problem.title: Your money and health data are the most sensitive things you own.
problem.lead: Most apps that handle your budget or your health can read, analyze, and sometimes sell what you put in. This data should only be readable by you.

free.title: Free is never free
free.description: When an app does not charge you, its business model often rests on what it learns about you: income, spending, treatments.

profile.title: The most intimate profile
profile.description: Combined, your money and health data map out your entire life. No other combination is this revealing.

readable.title: Readable means vulnerable
readable.description: As long as a service can decrypt your data, everything hinges on it: its diligence, its security, its future policies, an acquisition.

how.title: Encrypted on your device, never on the server.
how.subtitle: DashFlow uses a double key envelope. The server only stores encrypted data it cannot open. Here is the principle, without the needless jargon.

step1.title: Your password derives a key
step1.body: When you sign in, your password runs through PBKDF2 to produce an encryption key. That key never leaves your device and is never sent to the server.

step2.title: The key unlocks your master key
step2.body: This derived key unlocks your master key, unique to your account. That is the double envelope: changing your password only re-encrypts the master key, not all of your data.

step3.title: Your data is encrypted with AES-256-GCM
step3.body: The master key encrypts each piece of data with AES-256-GCM before it is sent. The server only ever receives ciphertext: if it is compromised, the attacker leaves with unreadable bytes.

budget.title: Your budget, under control.
budget.subtitle: Accounts, envelopes, recurring charges and loans. A clear view of what comes in, what goes out and what is left, month after month.
budget.screenshotAlt: DashFlow bank account view with income, direct debits, annual charges, expenses and remaining balance

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Multiple accounts (current, savings, joint). End-of-month balance estimate and money left once all charges are deducted.

envelopes.title: Envelopes
envelopes.description: Set money aside for holidays, a project or taxes. Track progress toward each savings goal.

recurrences.title: Recurring expenses
recurrences.description: Monthly and annual charges, direct debits, transfers. Automatic projection over twelve months.

loans.title: Loans and debts
loans.description: Due dates, remaining principal and repayment progress, per household member.

medical.title: Health tracking for the whole family.
medical.subtitle: Members, practitioners, appointments, prescriptions, medications and documents. Everyone's full care journey in a single encrypted view.
medical.screenshotAlt: DashFlow medical appointments view with patient, practitioner, status and reason for visit

members.title: Members and practitioners
members.description: One record per family member, linked to their practitioners. Visit history and reasons kept in one place.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.description: Schedule by patient and by practitioner, with planned or completed status. Shared calendar exportable as iCal.

medications.title: Medications
medications.description: Stock, dosage and estimated days remaining. Alert when a treatment is running low.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Prescriptions, lab results, certificates. Attachments encrypted on your device before they are stored.

pricing.title: Free to start, Premium for life.
pricing.subtitle: End-to-end encryption is included in both plans. You only pay if you want to unlock everything, and only once.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: The budget essentials, encrypted, with no time limit.

premium.name: Premium
premium.tagline: Everything in Free, plus full medical tracking and the whole family.

q1.question: What exactly is encrypted?
q1.answer: All sensitive content: amounts, transactions, envelopes, medical records, prescriptions and attachments. Encryption happens on your device before sending. The server only keeps encrypted data it cannot open.

q2.question: What happens if I lose my password and my recovery key?
q2.answer: Since we cannot read your data, we cannot decrypt it for you either. Without your password and your recovery key, the data stays unreadable, permanently. That is the honest trade-off of zero-knowledge: keep your recovery key somewhere safe.

q3.question: Is the Premium payment really one-time?
q3.answer: Yes. Premium is a one-time payment of 49€ that unlocks every feature for life. No subscription, no renewal, no hidden charge.

q4.question: Can I export or delete my data?
q4.answer: Yes. You can export your data at any time and delete your account permanently. Deletion wipes your encrypted data from our servers.

q5.question: Is the Free plan free forever?
q5.answer: Yes. The Free plan covers the budget essentials with end-to-end encryption included, with no time limit and no credit card.

finalCta.title: Keep your data to yourself.
finalCta.subtitle: Create your free account in seconds. Everything is encrypted from the start.
